conservative.name: Treason of Tzeentch
conservative.requirements:
8 Power
Target living creature within medium range. The target must either have one or more corruption or a mutation, or be suffering from on of your Tzeentch spells

success.description: As above, and the target adds to his dice pool for all actions that target you

boon.description: The target is unaware of your control until you force him to act

challenge.description: Effect: Tzeentch's treacherous whispers seize control of the target. While this spell is recharging, you and the target both control his body. He acts normally on his turn, but on your turn you may act through him, using his characteristics, talents, and actions. If you take actions both through the target and yourself in the same turn, each additional action suffers . You can't force the target to take extra manoeuvres or directly injure himself

reckless.name: Treason of Tzeentch
reckless.requirements:
8 Power
Target living creature within medium range. The target must either have one or more corruption or a mutation, or be suffering from one of your Tzeentch spells

success.description: As above, and you may immediately take an action through the target

challenge.description: Effect: Tzeentch's treacherous whispers seize control of the target. While this spell is recharging, you and the target both control his body. He acts normally on his turn, but on your turn you may act through him, using his characteristics, talents, and actions. If you take actions both through the target and yourself in the same turn, each additional action suffers . You can't force the target to take extra manoeuvres or directly injure himself
